title: Reference Storybook Transform 7 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: storybook reference transformation built around fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile in storybook garden path with soft flowers, warm sky, gentle depth, and cheerful decorative atmosphere. Subject: fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile stays visually recognizable from the reference while gaining a charming illustrated storybook treatment. Scene: storybook garden path with soft flowers, warm sky, gentle depth, and cheerful decorative atmosphere provides the magical environment, with small hearts, stars, flower doodles, rounded stickers, sparkle marks, and soft playful framing used as small joyful accents. Composition: Preserve the reference subject grouping and main silhouette while turning the image into a vertical storybook illustration. Style: Clean children-book and stationery-art transformation with soft shapes, gentle color, readable expressions, polished linework, and warm decorative charm. Color Palette: Soft cheerful palette with cream paper, warm highlights, pastel accents, and clean readable subject colors. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: Avoid large text; let decorative elements stay visual rather than typographic. Signature Elements: fictional adult woman in a yellow raincoat holding a small corgi, front-facing with a soft smile, storybook garden path with soft flowers, warm sky, gentle depth, and cheerful decorative atmosphere, small hearts, stars, flower doodles, rounded stickers, sparkle marks, and soft playful framing, and yellow raincoat, white sneakers, small corgi, canvas tote, and simple reference-consistent accessories define the reusable storybook transformation. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
